text.title: Value Stream Management Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the `ValueStreamReport` produced by VSM. Forbidden patterns + valid/invalid examples enforce the six core rules.

list.item: `customer_anchor.start_event` matching "ticket created" or "issue opened" without an upstream user-request step — violates `customer-anchored-boundary`.
`dora.deployment_frequency` reported as a single integer instead of `{human_prs, bot_prs}` — violates `ai-pr-bot-split`.

example.note: Customer anchor uses "ticket created/merged"; missing 3 of 4 work types; bot/human split missing in DORA; elite label without 2-quarter trend; sample size 18 below 50 minimum; no experiments listed.
